title: Fake Image Detection Dataset
description:
3-class fake image detection dataset: REAL | AI_GENERATED | EDITED.

Structure:
  train/real/         — authentic camera photos
  train/ai_generated/ — GAN/diffusion-model generated images
  train/edited/       — copy-move, splicing, retouching manipulations
  val/real/
  val/ai_generated/
  val/edited/

Sources: FFHQ/Flickr-Faces (real), StyleGAN/Stable Diffusion (AI), CASIA v2 (edited).
Use with FakeGuard AI: https://github.com/RuudyLinux/Fake-Image-Detections
